integration_validation_v3.evidence: New kernel-diagnostics surface src/diagnostics/product_anchor_matrix.rs, matrix_id 'wp-kernel-005.kernel-diagnostics.anchor-verification@1', distinct from MT-082 pose/media/comfy matrix. Covers all 8 contract surfaces (sessions, command-catalog, workflow-engine, dcc, locus, flight-recorder, visual-capture, build-diagnostics). verify_kernel_diagnostics_anchor_matrix (202-292) re-checks every declared product path AND proof ref against the filesystem, downgrades missing anchors to BLOCKED_MISSING_ANCHOR. All 32 cited anchor+proof paths independently confirmed to exist. Proof: tests/atelier_kernel_diagnostics_anchor_tests.rs - verifies against real repo root, all 8 anchors Verified, persists via record_source_evidence_matrix into live PostgreSQL, re-reads, EventLedger verified_anchor_count=8/blocked=0; negative test: empty tempdir root downgrades all 8 to BLOCKED_MISSING_ANCHOR persisted with ledger evidence.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Anchor verification asserts path existence, not symbol-level checks - consistent with MT-082 precedent.
